summary: Execute RRA follow-up call now (Kigali business hours) to secure a 30-minute discovery/demo; if no connect, email immediately and schedule next touch; log and post status within 60 minutes.
reasoning: Highest-impact overdue revenue task with idle capacity; it is currently within Kigali business hours and prior directives remain unexecuted—this action directly advances pipeline and clears backlog.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call now and book 30-minute discovery/demo (Kigali/CAT)
task.description: Use the existing RRA follow-up playbook and execute now: 1) Review CRM/account notes; if company/deal records are missing, create them before logging activities. 2) Call the primary contact immediately (08:30–17:30 CAT); if unreachable, leave voicemail (if available) and within 10 minutes attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard. 3) On live contact, confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance requirements; handle objections; aim to book a 30-minute discovery/demo this week and send the calendar invite before ending the call. 4) If no connect, email the primary contact (cc known stakeholders) within 10 minutes proposing three 30-minute slots within the next 3 business days (Kigali/CAT) with a clear agenda, one-pager, and relevant case study. 5) Log all call attempts, emails, and outcomes in the CRM; if the meeting is not booked, schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted. 6) If numbers are invalid or email bounces, flag specific gaps and hand off to the research agent for enrichment. 7) Post a brief status update within 60 minutes summarizing attempts, outcomes, and next steps.
